categories.name: Campus
categories.description: Explore key locations around CWRU's campus.

challenges.title: Find the Spartan Statue
challenges.description: Take a group photo with the famous CWRU Spartan statue.

challenges.title: Library Landmark
challenges.description: Snap a picture of your team in front of Kelvin Smith Library.

challenges.title: Hidden Study Spot
challenges.description: Discover and photograph a cozy study spot on campus.

categories.name: Team
categories.description: Get to know your group members.

challenges.title: Team Pyramid
challenges.description: Create a human pyramid with your group and capture the moment.

challenges.title: Fun Fact Circle
challenges.description: Record a short video where each teammate shares a fun fact.

challenges.title: Matching Pose
challenges.description: Take a photo where everyone strikes the same pose in front of a campus landmark.

categories.name: Creative
categories.description: Show off your artistic and silly side.

challenges.title: CWRU Album Cover
challenges.description: Stage a dramatic group photo that could be the cover of your first CWRU album.

challenges.title: Campus Mascot Remix
challenges.description: Draw or act out your own version of the CWRU mascot and take a photo.

challenges.title: Human Letters
challenges.description: Arrange your team to spell out 'CWRU' with your bodies and capture it from above.

categories.name: Academic
categories.description: Engage with academic spaces and themes on campus.

challenges.title: Major Matchup
challenges.description: Take a picture outside a building related to at least one teammate's intended major.

challenges.title: Study Squad
challenges.description: Pose as if you are in an intense study session in a classroom or study space.

challenges.title: Professor Quote
challenges.description: Find an academic quote or motto on campus and photograph your team around it.
